name: Loco-Moko
recipeInstructions:
1. Make 4 patties from ground beef.
2. Fry or broil the patties until well done.
3. Fry eggs sunny-side up or over easy.
4. Serve two scoops of rice on a platter.
5. Place a hamburger patty on the rice and one egg over the hamburger.
6. Pour gravy over everything and add desired seasoning.
Organizer: Somekine Ono
